mapper.select:
SELECT g.id, g.title, g.cover_image_url AS cover_image, g.category, g.content, g.view_count, g.created_at, MIN(s.price) AS min_price, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS related_count FROM guide g INNER JOIN guide_spot_relation gsr ON gsr.guide_id = g.id AND gsr.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN spot s ON s.id = gsr.spot_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 AND s.is_published = 1 WHERE g.is_deleted = 0 AND g.is_published = 1
AND s.price = 0
AND s.price >= 0 AND s.price <= #{maxPrice}
GROUP BY g.id, g.title, g.cover_image_url, g.category, g.content, g.view_count, g.created_at ORDER BY min_price ASC, g.created_at DESC
